hero.headline: Hands-on CX & AI help for growing teams.
hero.body: DBX Solutions combines 20+ years of hands-on CX and integration experience to help small and mid-sized businesses ship practical AI—not slide decks. Same senior judgment larger firms pay consultancies for, scoped for teams that need clarity, speed, and tools that fit how you already work.
points: Automate repetitive customer questions so your small team stops living in the inbox.
Plugs into the helpdesk, CRM, or chat apps you already pay for—no forced platform swap.
Plain-language roadmap: what to build first, what it costs, and what "done" looks like for your size of business.

value.noteText: = first workflow your customers actually use, running in your environment.

badges: Direct delivery—not a call center farm
Hands-on support when you need it
Works with mainstream SMB stacks (Zendesk, HubSpot, Salesforce, Freshdesk)

media.title: A simple path your team can follow.
media.body: We start with one high-impact workflow, connect it to your real tools, train your people, then improve based on real conversations—not theory.
media.caption: Built for SMB reality: ship, learn, improve—without a 40-person PMO.

hero.utility: Serving small and mid-market teams worldwide.

trust.label: Teams like yours trust DBX with customer experience and automation:

services.title: One partner. Clear packages. No shelfware.
services.description: DBX combines strategy, build, and coaching so your customers feel the difference—not just your roadmap slides. For organizations that want senior help without hiring a full in-house AI department.

cards.title: Plan & prioritize
cards.description: Figure out what to automate first, what to ignore, and what it should cost at your size.

cards.title: Build & integrate
cards.description: Ship flows that answer real customer questions and escalate cleanly to humans.
items: Chat/voice assistants tied to FAQs & tickets
Dashboards your ops lead can read

cards.title: Coach & improve
cards.description: Office hours, backlog grooming, and tuning after launch so adoption doesn't die after week three.

process.title: Three practical phases—built for busy SMB teams.
process.body: One accountable partner from first call to first live workflow—and the coaching your team needs so it sticks.

steps.title: Discover & prioritize
steps.body: We interview your leads, agents, or owners, map where time is lost, and pick one automation that pays back quickly.

steps.title: Design & scope
steps.body: Low-fi flows, clear success metrics, and a fixed scope your budget can absorb.

steps.title: Build, launch & coach
steps.body: We integrate with your CRM/helpdesk/chat, launch to a pilot group, train your team, and tune based on real tickets—weekly at first, then monthly.

proof.title: What we optimize for on every SMB engagement

stats.label: Clients who say they would recommend DBX
Median time to first live workflow
Combined experience across the core team

testimonials.quote: We were drowning in repeat questions on email and chat. DBX connected our CRM and messaging in one flow—the team finally uses one playbook.
testimonials.author: Operations Manager

testimonials.quote: No "big transformation theater." We shipped a working assistant in a few sprints and adjusted based on real tickets—not slide decks.
testimonials.author: Founder

contact.title: Tell us about your business
contact.body: Share who answers customers today, what tools you use, and what "better" looks like—we reply within one business day.
contact.urgency: We onboard a limited number of hands-on projects each quarter—ask about current availability.
contact.bookingNote: Prefer to talk live? Schedule a time →
